title: The Protein Trap: Your Body Is Paying for Your Obsession.
description: High-protein diets are everywhere, championed for muscle and weight loss. But emerging science suggests that consistently consuming protein far beyond what your body needs might activate pathways linked to accelerated aging, strain your kidneys, and even weaken your bones. We investigate the hidden physiological costs of America's protein obsession.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Protein Trap: Your Body Is Paying for Your Obsession.
